name: Imugene Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 79% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.1050, stop A$0.0891, target A$0.1350 (1.89:1) — then trail it.
